body_txt: Fact: Whether by pronunciation, spelling, or use, some words are just plain funny to certain characters. Warning: Do not use any of these words to try to make an unfunny sentence funny . Tends to overlap with I Just Like Saying the Word , as in the case of the page image. See also Narm , which can happen when these words crop up in inherently unfunny contexts. Also see Flowery Insults when used in an abusive manner. Also compare Heh Heh, You Said "X" , and LOL, 69 and 420, Blaze It for specific inherently funny numbers. For a different sort of inherently funny wording, check Tongue Twister . See also Perfectly Cromulent Word . Want to have some fun sharing your favorite ones? Take a gander over at the Just-For-Fun page !
